tuning: E A D G B E

----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                                  THE THONG SONG - Sisqo
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: Alex Miller

Tuning: Standard

Main string motif throughout the song:

[tab]e|-----------------|-------------------|
B|-----------------|-7--5--4---4-------|
G|--------1--2-----|---------6---6-----|
D|------4----------|---------------6---|
A|----4------------|-------------------|
E|--2--------------|-------------------|[/tab]
   [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]

The rest of the song is based around the two chords of F#m and C#m in this format.
